CDCdata 0.1.0
    • Get Started

Build a base request to the CDC API

Source: R/request.R
build_request2.Rd

Internal function to create an httr2 request object with common configuration: headers, authentication, retry logic, and rate limiting.

Usage

build_request2(endpoint, base_url = .cdc_base_url, format = "json")

Arguments

endpoint

Character. The API endpoint path.

base_url

Character. The base URL (default: data.cdc.gov).

format

Character. Response format: "json" or "csv".

Value

An httr2 request object.

On this page
